arts.ttl: Man Utd 'able' to sign special star Amorim 'LOVES'
arts.sum: Transfer expert Gianluca di Marzio believes that Sporting CP midfielder Morten Hjulmand will certainly be a player Amorim will try to sign next year. Amorim himself previously described Hjulmand as a more complete player than Man Utd summer signing Manuel Ugarte, who previously played under the coach at Sporting.

arts.ttl: Ashley Young creates Premier League history and beats record held by ex-Man Utd teammate
arts.sum: Everton's Ashley Young has written himself into the Premier League history books by becoming the oldest ever scorer of a free-kick - with the all-time record also within his grasp

arts.ttl: Arsenal's four-word banner on training ground wall makes perfect sense
arts.sum: Speaking on the Seaman Says podcast, sponsored by Betway, legendary Gunners goalkeeper David Seaman praised the club's commitment to set piece practicing, saying: "It's done on the training ground, and there's a lot of time spent on that. A key player in their formidable form is defender Gabriel Magalhaes, who has been a towering presence from corners, netting four times including a decisive winner against Tottenham and important goals versus Manchester City and West Ham .

arts.ttl: Man City suffer further blow amid Arsenal Premier League title race as key star ruled out
arts.sum: Manchester City will be without the services of Phil Foden for the foreseeable after the attacking midfielder picked up bronchitis following the defeat to Liverpool in the Premier League. Further injury problems for Pep Guardiola is only going to add to the tension surrounding City this evening and could play into the hands of Arsenal who are competing with the defending champions for the Premier League this season.

arts.ttl: Arsenal & Liverpool dealt major blow in pursuit of Premier League wonderkid
arts.sum: Adam Wharton has no plans to leave Crystal Palace this January despite growing interest from Premier League giants, according to reports. Wharton proved a revelation in the second half of last season following his January move from Blackburn Rovers. Unhappy Oliver Glasner informs the press of January plans at Crystal Palace! The midfielder’s form was […] The post Arsenal & Liverpool dealt major blow in pursuit of Premier League wonderkid appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: LIVE: Arsenal host Man United as Amorim and Arteta face off
arts.sum: A huge midweek clash from the Emirates Stadium. ESPN has updates

arts.ttl: I taught Ruben Amorim - the new Man United boss has one clear difference to Jose Mourinho
arts.sum: Manchester United's new head coach Ruben Amorim was schooled on the course that Jose Mourinho built

arts.ttl: Who is Godwill Kukonki? Ruben Amorim hands unlikely chance to 16-year-old Man Utd wonderkid
arts.sum: Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim has named Godwill Kukonki on the bench for his side's trip to Arsenal on Wednesday with the 16-year-old in line for his debut

arts.ttl: David de Gea shows where his loyalties lie with four-word Man Utd admission
arts.sum: Manchester United and Arsenal met on Wednesday night almost seven years to the day that David de Gea turned in a record-breaking performance in a 3-1 win against the Gunners at the Emirates Stadium

arts.ttl: What Luke Shaw's latest injury is at Manchester United as new recovery timeline revealed
arts.sum: Luke Shaw may not play again this calendar year for Man United after suffering another major muscular injury.
